title: Infosys Foundation commits over INR 48 Crore for maternal and child healthcare in rural Karnataka
detailed_summary: Infosys Foundation announced a CSR collaboration with Prashanthi Balamandira Trust to support Sri Sathya Sai Sarla Memorial Hospital in rural Karnataka. The Foundation pledged a grant of over INR 48 crore to improve maternal and child healthcare infrastructure and facilities, with the initiative expected to benefit over 8,000 individuals annually through free medical care.

key_facts.fact: Infosys Foundation announced its collaboration with Prashanthi Balamandira Trust to support Sri Sathya Sai Sarla Memorial Hospital in providing free medical care to underprivileged women, infants and children in rural Karnataka.
Infosys Foundation pledged a grant of over INR 48 crore to augment healthcare infrastructure and facilities in maternal and childcare services.
The initiative is expected to benefit over 8,000 deserving individuals annually.

esg_or_csr_items.item: Infosys Foundation committed a grant to support free maternal and child healthcare services at Sri Sathya Sai Sarla Memorial Hospital in rural Karnataka through a collaboration with Prashanthi Balamandira Trust.

important_text_spans.text: Infosys Foundation, the philanthropic and CSR arm of Infosys, today announced its collaboration with Prashanthi Balamandira Trust
important_text_spans.reason: Identifies the event as a CSR collaboration.

important_text_spans.text: the Infosys Foundation has pledged a grant of over INR 48 crore
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the financial scale of the CSR commitment.
